pluginDescription: Automatically call newly needed DXCC, grids, or callsigns while the operator is fully idle.
noveltyOverviewDesc: Use this to keep hunting fresh multipliers while staying in pure standby. Enable one or more novelty switches below; if any enabled type matches, the plugin proposes an automatic call for the next slot.
watchNewDxccDesc: Trigger when a decoded station belongs to a DXCC entity not yet worked in this operator's logbook. Deleted DXCC entities are ignored.
watchNewGridDesc: Trigger when a decoded station carries a grid square that has not yet been worked in this operator's logbook.
watchNewCallsignDesc: Trigger when the decoded station callsign has not yet been worked in this operator's logbook.
triggerModeDesc: Choose which kinds of appearances should be considered. All modes still include messages addressed directly to your callsign before the novelty check is applied.
autocallPriorityDesc: Higher values win when multiple automatic-call plugins match in the same slot.
